name: ArchLens - Platform Dashboard
description: Dashboard completo do ArchLens: métricas de negócio, AI pipeline, infraestrutura, mensageria, logs e erros.

pages.name: Visão Geral
pages.description: Golden Signals: throughput, latência, taxa de erro e saturation por serviço.

rawConfiguration.text:
## ArchLens — Visão Geral da Plataforma
Monitora os três serviços do pipeline: **Upload → Processing (AI) → Report**.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Análises' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Analise/Status/recebido' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) AS 'Error Rate %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentile(newrelic.timeslice.value, 95) AS 'P95 (s)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Analise/TempoProcessamento' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Relatórios' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'report-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Relatorio/Gerados' SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND metricTimesliceName IN ('Custom/Analise/Status/recebido', 'Custom/Analise/Status/em_processamento', 'Custom/Analise/Status/analisado', 'Custom/Analise/Status/erro') FACET metricTimesliceName SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'req/min' FROM Transaction WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET appName TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT average(duration) AS 'avg (s)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET appName TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) AS 'error %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET appName TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Confiança Média' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/AvgConfidence' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Componentes (avg)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/ComponentCount' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Riscos (avg)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/RiskCount' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Falhas' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Analise/Falhas' SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Avg (s)', percentile(newrelic.timeslice.value, 50) AS 'P50 (s)', percentile(newrelic.timeslice.value, 95) AS 'P95 (s)', max(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Max (s)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Analise/TempoProcessamento' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago

pages.name: Upload Service
pages.description: APM, métricas de upload, status de análises e erros do upload-service.

rawConfiguration.text:
## Upload Service — APM & Métricas de Negócio
Rotas: `POST /v1/analises` · `GET /v1/analises/{id}` · `POST /v1/analises/{id}/retry` · `GET /v1/analises/{id}/relatorio/download`

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'req/min' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) AS 'Error Rate %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT average(duration) AS 'Avg (s)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT apdex(duration, 0.5) AS 'Apdex' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'req/min' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT percentile(duration, 50, 95, 99) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' FACET name TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago LIMIT 10

SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND metricTimesliceName IN ('Custom/Analise/Status/recebido', 'Custom/Analise/Status/em_processamento', 'Custom/Analise/Status/analisado', 'Custom/Analise/Status/erro') FACET metricTimesliceName SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND metricTimesliceName IN ('Custom/Analise/Status/recebido', 'Custom/Analise/Status/em_processamento', 'Custom/Analise/Status/analisado', 'Custom/Analise/Status/erro') FACET metricTimesliceName TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago

SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Avg Bytes', max(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Max Bytes' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Upload/TamanhoBytes' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago

SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Avg (s)', percentile(newrelic.timeslice.value, 95) AS 'P95 (s)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Analise/TempoProcessamento' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Falhas' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Analise/Falhas' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(duration) AS 'Avg (s)', max(duration) AS 'Max (s)', count(*) AS 'Count' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' FACET name SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 10

SELECT count(*) AS 'Count', latest(errorMessage) AS 'Mensagem', latest(errorClass) AS 'Classe' FROM TransactionError WHERE appName = 'upload-service' FACET errorClass, transactionName SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 20
SELECT count(*) AS 'Retries' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND name LIKE '%retry%' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Downloads' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND name LIKE '%download%' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) AS 'Error %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND name LIKE '%retry%' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) AS 'Error %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND name LIKE '%download%' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'req/min', percentile(duration, 95) AS 'P95 (s)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND name LIKE '%retry%' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'req/min', percentile(duration, 95) AS 'P95 (s)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND name LIKE '%download%' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago

SELECT count(*) AS 'Count', latest(errorMessage) AS 'Mensagem', latest(errorClass) AS 'Classe' FROM TransactionError WHERE appName = 'upload-service' AND (transactionName LIKE '%retry%' OR transactionName LIKE '%download%') FACET errorClass, transactionName SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 20

pages.name: Processing Service (AI)
pages.description: Pipeline de IA: latência, confiança, componentes, riscos, retentativas e eventos customizados.

rawConfiguration.text:
## Processing Service — Pipeline de IA (LiteLLM / PydanticAI)
Evento: `DiagramaEnviado` → análise AI → `AnaliseConcluida` / `AnaliseFalhou`

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Avg (s)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/LatencySeconds' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Confiança (0-1)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/AvgConfidence' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Retentativas' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/ValidationRetries' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Sucesso' FROM AnaliseSucesso SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Latência do Pipeline AI (s) — avg / P95 / Max

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Avg (s)', percentile(newrelic.timeslice.value, 95) AS 'P95 (s)', max(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Max (s)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/LatencySeconds' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago

widgets.title: Confiança Média ao Longo do Tempo

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Confiança Média' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/AvgConfidence' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Sucesso' FROM AnaliseSucesso TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Falha' FROM AnaliseFalha TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago

SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Componentes (avg)', max(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Componentes (max)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/ComponentCount' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Riscos (avg)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/RiskCount' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Retentativas' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'processing-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/AI/ValidationRetries' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT average(duracao_segundos) AS 'Avg (s)', percentile(duracao_segundos, 95) AS 'P95 (s)', max(duracao_segundos) AS 'Max (s)' FROM AnaliseSucesso TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT analise_id, duracao_segundos, total_componentes, total_riscos, timestamp FROM AnaliseSucesso ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20 SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT analise_id, tipo_erro, erro, timestamp FROM AnaliseFalha ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20 SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM AnaliseFalha FACET tipo_erro SINCE 6 hours ago

SELECT count(*) AS 'Count', latest(errorMessage) AS 'Mensagem', latest(errorClass) AS 'Classe' FROM TransactionError WHERE appName = 'processing-service' FACET errorClass, transactionName SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 20

pages.name: Report Service
pages.description: Geração e consulta de relatórios de arquitetura.

rawConfiguration.text:
## Report Service — Geração de Relatórios
Rota: `GET /v1/relatorios/{analise_id}` · Geração via LiteLLM · Armazenamento no S3

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Gerados' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'report-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Relatorio/Gerados' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Avg (s)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'report-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Relatorio/TempoGeracao' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Duplicados' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'report-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Relatorio/Duplicados' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Consultas' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'report-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Relatorio/Consultas' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Gerados' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'report-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Relatorio/Gerados' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago

widgets.title: Tempo de Geração (s) — avg / P95 / Max

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Avg (s)', percentile(newrelic.timeslice.value, 95) AS 'P95 (s)', max(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Max (s)' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'report-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Relatorio/TempoGeracao' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'req/min' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'report-service' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT average(duration) AS 'Avg (s)', percentile(duration, 95) AS 'P95 (s)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'report-service' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Duplicados' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'report-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Relatorio/Duplicados' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'Consultas' FROM Metric WHERE appName = 'report-service' AND metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Relatorio/Consultas' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago

SELECT count(*) AS 'Count', latest(errorMessage) AS 'Mensagem', latest(errorClass) AS 'Classe' FROM TransactionError WHERE appName = 'report-service' FACET errorClass, transactionName SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 20

pages.name: Infraestrutura & Mensageria
pages.description: Containers (CPU/memória/rede), filas RabbitMQ (DLQs incluídos) e PostgreSQL.

rawConfiguration.text:
## Infraestrutura & Mensageria
Containers Docker · RabbitMQ (exchange `analise.events`) · PostgreSQL · LocalStack S3

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(cpuPercent) AS 'CPU %' FROM ContainerSample WHERE name IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET name TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT average(memoryUsageBytes) / 1e6 AS 'Mem MB' FROM ContainerSample WHERE name IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET name TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(networkRxBytesPerSecond) AS 'Rx B/s', average(networkTxBytesPerSecond) AS 'Tx B/s' FROM ContainerSample WHERE name IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET name TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT average(cpuPercent) AS 'CPU %', average(memoryUsedPercent) AS 'Mem %' FROM SystemSample FACET hostname TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(queue.messagesReadyDeliveryClients) AS 'Prontas', average(queue.messagesReadyUnacknowledged) AS 'Não-ack', average(queue.totalMessages) AS 'Total' FROM RabbitmqQueueSample WHERE entityName LIKE '%processing-service.pipeline' AND entityName NOT LIKE '%.dlq' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(queue.messagesReadyDeliveryClients) AS 'Prontas', average(queue.messagesReadyUnacknowledged) AS 'Não-ack', average(queue.totalMessages) AS 'Total' FROM RabbitmqQueueSample WHERE entityName LIKE '%report-service.reports' AND entityName NOT LIKE '%.dlq' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(queue.messagesReadyDeliveryClients) AS 'Prontas', average(queue.messagesReadyUnacknowledged) AS 'Não-ack', average(queue.totalMessages) AS 'Total' FROM RabbitmqQueueSample WHERE entityName LIKE '%upload-service.status-updates' AND entityName NOT LIKE '%.dlq' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT average(queue.totalMessages) AS 'Mensagens DLQ' FROM RabbitmqQueueSample WHERE entityName LIKE '%.dlq' FACET entityName TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT latest(queue.totalMessages) AS 'Total DLQ' FROM RabbitmqQueueSample WHERE entityName LIKE '%.dlq' SINCE 15 minutes ago

SELECT latest(queue.messagesReadyDeliveryClients) AS 'Prontas', latest(queue.messagesReadyUnacknowledged) AS 'Não-ack', latest(queue.consumers) AS 'Consumers', latest(queue.totalMessages) AS 'Total', latest(queue.messagesPublishedPerSecond) AS 'Pub/s', latest(queue.messagesAcknowledgedPerSecond) AS 'Ack/s' FROM RabbitmqQueueSample FACET entityName SINCE 15 minutes ago LIMIT 20

widgets.title: PostgreSQL — Tempo de Query por App

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(databaseDuration) AS 'DB Avg (s)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') AND databaseDuration IS NOT NULL FACET appName TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(duration) AS 'Avg (s)', count(*) AS 'Count', latest(databaseStatement) AS 'Statement' FROM DatastoreSegment WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET databaseStatement SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 10

pages.name: Logs & Erros
pages.description: Log volume por serviço, erros em tempo real, rastreamento de exceções e distributed tracing.

rawConfiguration.text:
## Logs & Erros — Todos os Serviços
Logs via **loguru → stdlib logging → NR agent**. Campos extras do `bind()` disponíveis como atributos. Linking metadata: `trace.id`, `span.id`.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) AS 'Erros APM' FROM TransactionError WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) AS 'Error %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Log Lines' FROM Log WHERE entity.name IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Error Logs' FROM Log WHERE level = 'ERROR' AND entity.name IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Volume de Logs por Serviço e Nível

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE entity.name IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET entity.name, level TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

widgets.title: Erros APM por Serviço — Série Temporal

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) AS 'Erros' FROM TransactionError WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET appName TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT timestamp, entity.name, message, trace.id, span.id FROM Log WHERE level = 'ERROR' AND entity.name IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50 SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT count(*) AS 'Count', latest(errorMessage) AS 'Mensagem' FROM TransactionError WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET errorClass, appName SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Erros por Classe de Exceção — Distribuição

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM TransactionError WHERE appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') FACET errorClass SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 20

SELECT timestamp, trace.id, appName, name, duration, error.message FROM Span WHERE error.message IS NOT NULL AND appName IN ('upload-service', 'processing-service', 'report-service') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 30 SINCE 1 hour ago

pages.name: AWS Infrastructure
pages.description: Métricas AWS coletadas via New Relic AWS Integration (CloudWatch Metric Streams) do stack EC2: RDS (archlens-ec2-db), S3 (archlens-ec2-diagramas-*) e EC2 host.

rawConfiguration.text:
## AWS Infrastructure — ArchLens (EC2 single-host)
Serviços monitorados: **RDS PostgreSQL** (`archlens-ec2-db`) · **S3** (`archlens-ec2-diagramas-*`) · **EC2** host (`archlens-ec2`).
Fonte: CloudWatch Metric Streams (`FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = ...`) + agent newrelic-infra dentro do EC2 (`SystemSample` / `ContainerSample`).

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(aws.rds.CPUUtilization) AS 'CPU %' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/RDS' AND aws.rds.DBInstanceIdentifier = 'archlens-ec2-db' SINCE 10 minutes ago
SELECT latest(aws.rds.DatabaseConnections) AS 'Connections' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/RDS' AND aws.rds.DBInstanceIdentifier = 'archlens-ec2-db' SINCE 10 minutes ago
SELECT average(aws.rds.FreeStorageSpace) / 1e9 AS 'Free GB' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'aws.rds.FreeStorageSpace' AND aws.rds.DBInstanceIdentifier = 'archlens-ec2-db' SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT average(aws.rds.FreeableMemory) / 1e6 AS 'Free MB' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'aws.rds.FreeableMemory' AND aws.rds.DBInstanceIdentifier = 'archlens-ec2-db' SINCE 30 minutes ago

widgets.title: RDS — CPU & Memória ao Longo do Tempo

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(aws.rds.CPUUtilization) AS 'CPU %', average(aws.rds.FreeableMemory) / 1e6 AS 'Free Mem (MB)' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/RDS' AND aws.rds.DBInstanceIdentifier = 'archlens-ec2-db' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(aws.rds.ReadLatency) AS 'Read (s)', average(aws.rds.WriteLatency) AS 'Write (s)' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/RDS' AND aws.rds.DBInstanceIdentifier = 'archlens-ec2-db' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(aws.rds.ReadIOPS) AS 'Read IOPS', average(aws.rds.WriteIOPS) AS 'Write IOPS' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/RDS' AND aws.rds.DBInstanceIdentifier = 'archlens-ec2-db' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(aws.rds.ReadThroughput) AS 'Read B/s', average(aws.rds.WriteThroughput) AS 'Write B/s' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/RDS' AND aws.rds.DBInstanceIdentifier = 'archlens-ec2-db' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT average(aws.s3.BucketSizeBytes) / 1e9 AS 'Size (GB)' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/S3' AND aws.s3.BucketName LIKE 'archlens-ec2-diagramas-%' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 1 day ago
SELECT average(aws.s3.NumberOfObjects) AS 'Objects' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/S3' AND aws.s3.BucketName LIKE 'archlens-ec2-diagramas-%' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 1 day ago

SELECT sum(aws.s3.AllRequests) AS 'All', sum(`aws.s3.4xxErrors`) AS '4xx', sum(`aws.s3.5xxErrors`) AS '5xx' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/S3' AND aws.s3.BucketName LIKE 'archlens-ec2-diagramas-%' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(aws.s3.FirstByteLatency) AS 'FirstByte (ms)', average(aws.s3.TotalRequestLatency) AS 'Total (ms)' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/S3' AND aws.s3.BucketName LIKE 'archlens-ec2-diagramas-%' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT sum(aws.s3.BytesUploaded) AS 'Uploaded', sum(aws.s3.BytesDownloaded) AS 'Downloaded' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/S3' AND aws.s3.BucketName LIKE 'archlens-ec2-diagramas-%' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

rawConfiguration.text:
### EC2 — Host `archlens-ec2` (single-instance deploy via docker-compose)
Fontes: **CloudWatch** (`aws.ec2.*`) + agente **newrelic-infra** dentro do EC2 (`SystemSample`, `ContainerSample`, `ProcessSample`).

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(aws.ec2.CPUUtilization) AS 'CPU %' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/EC2' SINCE 10 minutes ago
SELECT sum(aws.ec2.StatusCheckFailed) AS 'Failures' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/EC2' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT latest(memoryUsedPercent) AS 'Mem %' FROM SystemSample WHERE displayName = 'archlens-ec2' SINCE 5 minutes ago
SELECT latest(diskUsedPercent) AS 'Disk %' FROM StorageSample WHERE displayName = 'archlens-ec2' AND mountPoint = '/' SINCE 5 minutes ago

widgets.title: EC2 — CloudWatch CPU & Rede ao Longo do Tempo

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(aws.ec2.CPUUtilization) AS 'CPU %', average(aws.ec2.NetworkIn) / 1e6 AS 'In MB/s', average(aws.ec2.NetworkOut) / 1e6 AS 'Out MB/s' FROM Metric WHERE aws.Namespace = 'AWS/EC2' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago
SELECT average(cpuPercent) AS 'CPU %', average(memoryUsedPercent) AS 'Mem %' FROM SystemSample WHERE displayName = 'archlens-ec2' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(loadAverageOneMinute) AS '1m', average(loadAverageFiveMinute) AS '5m', average(loadAverageFifteenMinute) AS '15m' FROM SystemSample WHERE displayName = 'archlens-ec2' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT average(readBytesPerSecond) AS 'Read B/s', average(writeBytesPerSecond) AS 'Write B/s' FROM StorageSample WHERE displayName = 'archlens-ec2' AND device NOT LIKE 'loop%' FACET device TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 3 hours ago

SELECT latest(cpuPercent) AS 'CPU %', latest(memoryUsageBytes) / 1e6 AS 'Mem MB', latest(restartCount) AS 'Restarts', latest(state) AS 'State' FROM ContainerSample FACET name SINCE 15 minutes ago LIMIT 20
